title: Kewa bowkeriana
intro: Kewa bowkeriana, also known as Kewa or New Zealand spinach tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, native to New Zealand. The health benefits of Kewa bowkeriana include its use as a natural diuretic, which can aid in reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Kewa bowkeriana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of edema.
